violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee did not wash her hands before putting on gloves. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Multiple food items were found in the reach-in cooler and prep table without date markings. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked with the preparation or disposition date when they will be held more than 24 hours.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
